title: Linochilus ellipticus

However, various species of orchids have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their potential health benefits. parts: Linochilus ellipticus is a species of orchid native to Borneo. Linochilus ellipticus is known to have medicinal properties, with its tubers being used in traditional medicine. The tubers of Linochilus ellipticus are rich in starch and are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. They are also used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues. The tubers are typically harvested and dried for later use in traditional medicine practices.
